feed_baseline: Normal business-hours interactive logons (07:45-09:00 and 17:00-18:30) for achen/ws01, bnguyen/ws02, dpark/ws03, psharma/ws04, mtorres/ws05, skim/ws06, and treilly/bws01.
Routine SMB traffic from workstations to fs01 across Finance, HR, Sales, and IT shares during business hours.
The nightly fs01 -> srv03 backup job 01:00-01:45 run by svc_backupjob -- pre-existing, unrelated to the incident.
Routine AD/DNS query traffic and periodic GPO refreshes on dc01, plus normal admin logons from bnguyen and skim during business hours.
bnguyen's routine RDP sessions to dc01, fs01, srv02, srv03, and various workstations during business hours for IT support.
Routine HTTPS traffic from HR/Finance workstations (psharma, achen) to srv02 for the HR portal and expense system during business hours.

fw01: normal outbound HTTPS from all workstations to common SaaS/cloud destinations; the site-to-site VPN to bfw01 carrying routine branch traffic; constant low-level scanning/credential-stuffing background noise against the RDP/VPN gateway portal.
bfw01/branch office: NATs bws01's traffic out locally and carries routine HQ-bound traffic over the VPN to fw01.
